creator: freebsd@simweb.ch
text:
Created attachment 159770
Bumps net-mgmt/lldpd to 0.7.16

Dear Ports committers

Being the maintainer of this port, attached is a patch that bumps net-mgmt/lldpd to its recent release 0.7.16

Explanation to the changes:
- Upstream fixed bash completion location, explains changes in pkg-plist
- Explicitely enable hardening, introduced with 0.7.15 
  (hardening is on by default, but make sure it's enabled explicitely)

Best regards,
Mathieu
